description_long: This stuffed toy is designed to resemble a cartoonish animatronic bear, featuring a dark gray body with articulated limbs and a rounded belly marked by a black star. Its face is expressive, with one yellow eye and one hollow socket, a wide mouth showing white teeth, and a small black nose. The bear wears a black top hat and has round ears, adding to its playful yet slightly eerie appearance. Its hands and feet are detailed with white claws, and the joints are segmented, giving it a mechanical look. The toy's surface appears soft and matte, typical of plush toys, but the segmented limbs and facial features suggest a stylized, robotic character. This toy would likely be found in urban environments such as parks, playgrounds, or as a novelty item in stores.
description: A dark gray animatronic bear stuffed toy with a black top hat, expressive face, and segmented limbs, featuring a black star on its belly and white claws on its hands and feet.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bear's face with one yellow eye, a wide mouth, black top hat, and the black star on its belly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the bear's protruding snout, rounded belly, and the articulation of its limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, body, and limbs, with no facial features visible and the back of the top hat.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the snout, ear, and limb articulation, with the right hand slightly forward.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is a wide, slightly unsettling smile with visible white teeth, one open yellow eye, and one hollow eye socket, giving a playful yet eerie look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms slightly bent and one hand raised, legs apart and head facing forward.
